channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Carney criticizes U.S. tariff deals, urges caution for Canada
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney spoke with CBC regarding recent U.S. tariff-relief agreements, stating that many countries hastily entered deals that ultimately offered little benefit. Carney highlighted t...

item.description: US President Donald Trump has nominated former Republican congressman and academic David Brat to serve as the next United States ambassador to Australia, more than a year into his presidency. The appo...

item.title: Kerala’s First Heart Transplant Patient via Air Ambulance Dies After 10 Years
item.description: Mathew Achadan, aged 57, the first person in Kerala to receive a heart transplant through an airlifted organ, passed away on Monday following a cardiac arrest at a private hospital in Chalakudy, Thris...

item.title: Federal High Court restricts media from attending trial of accused coup plotters

item.title: Walmart recalls adjustable dumbbells after multiple safety incidents
item.description: Thousands of adjustable dumbbells sold at Walmart in the United States have been recalled following 115 reports of weight plates becoming dislodged. Tzumi Electronics has announced the recall of 50,00...

item.title: UK Researchers Explore Marine Cloud Brightening to Mitigate Extreme Heat
